# Bartosz Rajchert

Software / Design Engineer

Building software with a focus on design, usability, and function.

I work at [PwC in the Cloud & Digital](https://www.pwc.com/) department, where I create digital products based on cloud solutions, which I enrich with an intuitive interface.

I consider myself a designer at heart with high technical skills, and enjoy building highly polished products.

You can reach me on [X](https://x.com/bartoszrajchert) or by [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bartoszrajchert/).

Check out my cool open-source projects on [GitHub](https://github.com/bartoszrajchert).

## Projects

### OpenBase

Is a desktop database workspace. It supports popular SQL dialects for schema browsing, query execution, relationship visualization, and more.

https://github.com/bartoszrajchert/openbase

### Tokun

The simple, and easy-to-use tool for working with design tokens with powerups. It can support you building themes and using it in multiple platforms.

https://tokun.bartoszrajchert.com/

## Companies

- [PwC](https://www.pwc.com/)
- [HSBC](https://www.hsbc.com/)
- [Accenture](https://www.accenture.com/)
- [Move Closer](https://movecloser.co/)
